news.title: 30-year Treasury yield tops 5.19%, highest since before the financial crisis
news.summary: Bond markets on edge as traders monitor central bank responses to renewed inflation fears. Global bond markets remain on edge with traders monitoring central bank response to renewedflation fears.

news.title: Trump says it's not a 'war.' Insurers with money on the line say it is
news.summary: Businesses in the Middle East bought insurance that protects against terrorism or sabotage. But far fewer purchased coverage explicitly designed to cover "war"

news.title: The AI economy is rewriting the American Dream — and blue-collar workers are poised to win
news.summary: AI-driven hiring slowdowns are hitting some entry-level jobs for college graduates. Companies like Ford and AT&T ramp up recruiting for skilled trade workers.

news.title: Trump says he was 'an hour away' from Iran strike decision before he postponed it
news.summary: Trump says Iran has to come to the table. He says it could be two or three days, or perhaps until Sunday or early next week.

news.title: Bessent urges G7 to help U.S. attack Iran's finances
news.summary: The Iran war continues to wreak havoc on global oil supply and the broader economy. The conflict appears to be locked in an uneasy stalemate.

news.title: 5 money moves that made this 32-year-old dad a millionaire in just 9 years
news.summary: Blake Edwards and his wife became millionaires by their early 30s. A low starting salary, global pandemic, unaffordable housing market, graduate school and two kids didn't stop them.

news.title: ‘How much money do you make?’ Since you can’t ask your date that, ask this instead.
news.summary: Intentionally discussing aspirations and values can help daters determine if they’re financially compatible. Intentionally talking about your aspirations can help you determine if you're financially compatible with someone.

news.title: Buy now, pay maybe? This new crypto card brings ‘the casino to the checkout line’
news.summary: . Financial products have been increasingly adding gamelike features that create competition or instant gratification to keep users hooked. It's not the first time this has happened, but it's a new trend.

news.title: Oil shocks have historically triggered major market selloffs. Deutsche Bank says the Iran war is missing 3 key ingredients.
news.summary: The red flags warning of a bigger pullback for stocks and other assets that are perceived to be riskier have not yet appeared, Deutsche Bank analysts said.

news.title: Retirees are worried about the cost of healthcare — and who can blame them?
news.summary: The increase in Medicare Part B premiums has sparked concerns about out-of-pocket healthcare costs. The increase has been driven by a rise in the cost of the Part B prescription drug plan.
